fault_hypothesis: The expiration check on line 68 uses a strict greater-than comparison (>), but it should be greater-than-or-equal (>=) to correctly handle cases where the current time is exactly at the expiration boundary.

constraints.intent: The current time should not be exactly at the expiration boundary, as this edge case is handled incorrectly.
If a route value is returned (i.e., not considered expired), the current time must be strictly before its effective expiration.
The effective expiration time, which includes clock-skew tolerance, should not be earlier than the base expiration time.
